'''labudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encebollado|encebollado]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-b-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encebollado|encebollado]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| labudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læbidhith|læbidhith]] || [[word:læbidhij|læbidhij]] || [[word:læbidhish|læbidhish]] || [[word:læbidhi|læbidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:labubudhuth|labubudhuth]] || [[word:labubudhuj|labubudhuj]] || [[word:labubudhush|labubudhush]] || [[word:labubudhu|labubudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:labudhuth|labudhuth]] || [[word:labudhuj|labudhuj]] || [[word:labudhush|labudhush]] || [[word:labudhu|labudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:labufdhuth|labufdhuth]] || [[word:labufdhuj|labufdhuj]] || [[word:labufdhush|labufdhush]] || [[word:labufdhuf|labufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:labudhuthu|labudhuthu]] || [[word:labudhuju|labudhuju]] || [[word:labudhushu|labudhushu]] || [[word:labudhuku|labudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:labudhuth|labudhuth]] || [[word:labudhuj|labudhuj]] || [[word:labudhush|labudhush]] || [[word:labudhu|labudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:labudhuthul|labudhuthul]] || [[word:labudhujul|labudhujul]] || [[word:labudhushul|labudhushul]] || [[word:labudhukul|labudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:labudhuthuthu|labudhuthuthu]] || [[word:labudhujuju|labudhujuju]] || [[word:labudhushushu|labudhushushu]] || [[word:labudhuku|labudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:labudhuthun|labudhuthun]] || [[word:labudhujun|labudhujun]] || [[word:labudhushun|labudhushun]] || [[word:labudhukun|labudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:labudhuthuoro|labudhuthuoro]] || [[word:labudhujuoro|labudhujuoro]] || [[word:labudhushuoro|labudhushuoro]] || [[word:labudhukuoro|labudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
